oai_dc:dc.dc:title: A Message from the Editor
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: van den Broek, Susan
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Periodically AFA receives articles and pictures from Loro Parque Fundación and correspondent David Waugh. Many of the parrots featured are both rare in the wild and in aviculture. This edition of Watchbird features those articles and pictures. With the exception of the Citron-crested Cockatoo on the cover, the birds in this issue are not usually found in the pet trade in the United States. [For the full article, with images, please open the PDF link below]
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 52 No. 1 (2025): AFA Watchbird April 2025
